content:
Dear Prayer Partners,

Greetings from Lima, Peru! We hope this letter finds you blessed and encouraged in the Lord.

This past month has been filled with wonderful opportunities to share the Gospel. We had the privilege of seeing 15 souls come to Christ during our outreach events in the local communities.

Our church plant continues to grow, with an average attendance of 45 people each Sunday. We are so grateful for the faithfulness of our new believers and their hunger for God's Word.

Please pray for:
- The upcoming youth camp in February
- Our Bible translation project
- The health of our team members
- Open doors in new communities

We are so thankful for your continued prayers and support. You are a vital part of this ministry!

In His Service,
The Smith Family

"The harvest truly is plenteous, but the labourers are few." - Matthew 9:37
